title: Status indicator component with visual icons and color coding
purpose: Displays agent status with distinct visual indicators and messages for working, waiting, and idle states. Supports custom messages and dark mode styling.
module_context: Exports a React functional component StatusIndicator that accepts status, message, and className props. Defines TypeScript interface StatusIndicatorProps for type safety. Includes default messages and styling for each status type.

steps.content: Accept status, message, and className props from component configuration.
Define default messages for each status type: processing, waiting for input, and ready.
Determine the message to display, using custom message if provided or default message.
Map status to corresponding background, text, and border color styles for light and dark modes.
Generate ARIA label combining status and display message for accessibility.
Render a container div with appropriate styling and accessibility attributes.
Display a spinner icon for working status or warning/check icon for waiting/idle status.
Show the status message text with appropriate styling.
